scam_samples.text: your account is blocked share otp to unblock immediately
warnings: 🔢 OTP scam - Never share OTP with anyone calling you
🚨 CRITICAL: Request for sensitive information detected

scam_samples.text: congratulations you won lottery prize claim money now
warnings: 🎁 Prize scam - You cannot win a lottery you did not enter
